title: Calamus schlechteri
taxonomy: Calamus schlechteri is classified within the family Zingiberaceae, commonly known as the ginger family. This classification is based on the plant's morphological characteristics and genetic relationships with other members of the Zingiberaceae family. Calamus schlechteri is further classified within the genus Calamus, which includes various species of rattan palms. The genus Calamus is a group of climbing palms native to tropical regions of Asia. As a member of the Zingiberaceae family and the Calamus genus, Calamus schlechteri shares common characteristics with other ginger family plants and rattan palms.
